response.overview: On February 6, 2024, 25 of the world's most iconic Contemporary Christian, Gospel, and worship artists gathered in-the-round at Worldwide Stages in Spring Hill, Tennessee — all in the same room — to record something unprecedented. The result is House of Worship — a cinematic event that reimagines the most beloved worship anthems of the last 30 years as intimate, cross-generational duets, woven together with storytelling, artist interviews, and live performance captured on film.
response.title: House of Worship
